title: oenothera dentata var. campestris
intro: Oenothera dentata var. campestris, also known as campestre evening primrose, is a variety of the evening primrose plant (Oenothera dentata) that is native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), an essential fatty acid with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Oenothera dentata var. campestris include its potential to alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats, as well as its ability to soothe skin conditions like eczema and acne. Oenothera dentata var. campestris can be prepared as an herbal remedy in the form of oil, capsules, or tea, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
